title: [BTA] Too Many Blocks
description: Not Enough Items now in Better Than Adventure!
body:
Too Many Blocks is a Not Enough Items clone for Better Than Adventure!

TMB adds a searchable list of all items in the game to the right of your screen, where you can search for items using their name or by using `@` you can search for items using their mod's name.

TMB also adds an extendable recipe viewer designed to be more friendly to both mod developers and power users.
